title: Fix memory leak in database connection pool
original_text: Fixed a memory leak in the database connection pool. Connections were not being properly closed after use, causing the pool to exhaust over time. Updated the connection manager to call close() in a finally block. Also added a timeout mechanism to release stale connections. Modified db/connection_pool.py and added a test in tests/test_connection_pool.py. Verification: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen python3 -m unittest tests/test_connection_pool.py -v. Result: 8 tests pass, memory usage stable.
expected_subject: fix(db): close connections properly to prevent memory leak
expected_body_lines: - Ensure connections close in finally block
- Add timeout mechanism for stale connections
- Add regression test for connection lifecycle
- Validation: 8 tests pass, memory usage stable
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(db): close connections properly to prevent memory leak"
